introSection: Çelik Kartal is an indoor suspended kiddie wild mouse roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. It is an Air Force 5 model from Zamperla.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Çelik Kartal is an indoor suspended kiddie wild mouse roller coaster located at Wonderland Eurasia in Ankara, Ankara, Turkey. It is an Air Force 5 model from Zamperla.






 * A photograph of the ride on Facebook
